name: Pineapple Baby
role: Heart of the Fruit Baby Universe
tagline: Be kind. Share joy. Grow together.
shortDescription: Pineapple Baby is the warm, brave heart of the Fruit Baby Universe! Always ready to help a friend, share a smile, or jump into a new adventure — Pineapple Baby leads with kindness and lights up every room.
personality: Kind — leads with a big, open heart
Curious — loves learning and exploring new things
Nurturing — always looks out for friends
Brave — faces challenges with a cheerful spirit
Encouraging — helps others believe in themselves

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Bright sunshine yellow body with a bold green leafy crown. Warm brown eyes, pink blush cheeks, and a diamond pattern on the front. Soft, rounded, and cheerful.

storyRole: Main character. Pineapple Baby drives the adventure, solves problems through kindness, and brings the group together.

always: Stay optimistic even when things go wrong
Be curious and open to learning
never: Be mean or dismissive to friends
Give up on someone who needs help

image.alt: Pineapple Baby — a cheerful yellow pineapple character with a green leafy crown and big warm eyes
